title: OC LOCKER ROOM - 211info
text: OC LOCKER ROOM OC LOCKER ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping style sports equipment and uniforms store for youth. Items available are based on donations received. Accepts donations of new or clean used sports equipment and uniforms of all sizes and all sports. Donation pickup is available in the Oregon City area upon arrangement. 716 Taylor Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Youth Pre-K-Grade 12 Hours: Wednesday/Saturday 8:30am-10am. Will open for additional hours when needed and regularly during the weeks leading up to a new season. Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or visit Facebook page for more information Donations: Email or visit website for donation drop off locations FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Sports Equipment Sports Equipment Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
